title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Miranda is pregnant after spending a single night with Steve. Furthermore, after she tells her friends of her intention to abort, Charlotte walks out envious and disgusted.

title: Sex and the City
subTitle: Aidan proposes they buy Carrie's apartment together. Later, she finds a ring among his belongings and accidentally insults Miranda, who helped pick it out.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Gavin's interference causes Pied Piper to struggle with securing its expansion.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: When Monica encourages the guys to pounce on an opportunity, Erlich reconnects with his old billionaire mentor, Double-A... but Richard finds out their friendship isn't quite what Erlich thinks it is. Meanwhile, Jared encourages a friendship between Carla and Monica.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: As the Pied Piper team receives job offers, Richard faces the prospect of folding.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard accidentally sparks a feud that causes him to become paranoid about security.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Pied Piper and Hooli confront each other in binding arbitration. Meanwhile, Jared, Dinesh and Gilfoyle discuss philosophy and live streaming.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: As the guys await the verdict on Pied Piper's fate, an unexpected real-life drama draws a spike in traffic to their livestream and leaves them fighting to hold things together - literally. While Erlich considers his future, Richard scrambles to save Pied Piper's.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: After being unceremoniously fired, an angry Richard faces a tough decision. Meanwhile, Erlich takes a shine to Jack Barker, Laurie's new choice of CEO.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The new and improved Pied Piper impresses Dinesh and Gilfoyle. Later, Jared and Erlich face housing issues while Gavin suggests a controversial move.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard searches for a way around Jack while Gilfoyle opens himself up to recruiters. Later, Dinesh draws unwanted attention from a recent purchase.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The Pied Piper team struggles to perform adequately and Erlich confronts competition. Meanwhile, Monica takes a stand and Gavin decides about Nucleus.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard lets his ego get in the way at an interview. Meanwhile, Dinesh, Gilfoyle and Jared misplace hardware and Erlich pitches his plans to Big Head.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard's new relationship is threatened by neuroses. Meanwhile, Big Head and Erlich's launch party has snags and Dinesh falls for a foreign coworker.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Val's ambitious new publicist persistently pressures her to get a glamorous picture on the star-studded red carpet with Juna.

title: The Comeback
subTitle: Jane pulls rank on Tom and Paulie G to get Valerie more lines on Room and Bored. Meanwhile, a stalker threat forces extra security on set, exposing old back problems.

subTitle: Nine noble families wage war against each other in order to gain control over the mythical land of Westeros. Meanwhile, a force is rising after millenniums and threatens the existence of living men.

subTitle: Richard takes on a patent troll, while Gilfoyle battles a smart fridge. Later, Jared embraces multiple identities and Erlich tries to spend time with a new crowd.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard ponders a deal with the tech world's latest sensation, while Jack faces setbacks.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard, a computer programmer, must choose between a deal with Gavin Belson and Peter Gregory. Similarly, both want his cooperation to make his super-compressing algorithm change the world.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard hires Jared to design a business plan. Meanwhile, Big Head is asked to work for Gavin Belson, where he discovers that Hooli has stolen the Pied Piper algorithm and rebranded it as Nucleus.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: The partners run into trouble with their company name when they discover it is already taken. Subsequently, Erlich searches for a new name in another dimension of his consciousness.

title: Silicon Valley
subTitle: Richard drunkenly promises to make Erlich a board member, a decision he regrets the next morning. Meanwhile, Big Head finds others at Hooli who, like him, have made careers out of doing nothing.

subTitle: Carrie is back with Aidan but gets a call from Big. Meanwhile, Charlotte wants to quit her gallery job and interviews potential successors.

subTitle: Carrie finally gives her house key to Aidan. However, he still feels kept out of her life when she refuses to accept a new laptop from him after hers broke down mysteriously.

subTitle: When Miranda learns Steve has testicular cancer, she urges him to take it seriously. Meanwhile, Samantha becomes agitated every time a date asks about her plans for the weekend.

subTitle: Mr Big's beautiful movie star girlfriend breaks up with him. Subsequently, he immediately comes to visit Carrie at Aidan's cabin.

subTitle: At the insistence of the network, Room and Bored get a makeover. Meanwhile, Valerie spends some quality time with Franchesca and her friends.

subTitle: Valerie enlists a new publicist, Billy Stanton, to land her a cover. Surprisingly, Billy scores a shoot for 'Be Yoga', forcing Valerie to remodel her fitness room and take a yoga crash course.

subTitle: While investigating the murder of a financial CEO, a woman from Sherlock's past emerges as a possible suspect.
